pi_items.source: Export script export_result.sh checks wp_posts table for post_title exactly matching 'Historical Meteorite Landings Database'
Export script export_result.sh queries the database for 'Aachen' to confirm the authentic NASA data was successfully imported via TablePress. 'Aachen' corresponds to a real meteorite from 1880.
Setup script setup_task.sh creates the dataset precisely at this absolute path, which is also stated in the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires installing the TablePress plugin, importing the NASA Meteorite Landings dataset from /home/ga/Documents/meteorite_landings.csv, and publishing a WordPress post titled 'Historical Meteorite Landings Database'. The verification checks for the presence of the authentic data keyword 'Aachen' in the WordPress database, which corresponds to an actual 1880 meteorite fall included in the real NASA dataset.
